subject: Account Update - Your subscription has been renewed
preview: Your subscription has been renewed for another month.

subject: New login to Slack on Chrome

subject: Warning: Unusual Sign-In Detected - Immediate Action Required
preview: We detected a sign-in attempt from Austin, TX at 2:47 AM. If this was not you, secure your account now.
body_html:
Hello,

We detected an unusual sign-in attempt on your Chase Mobile app from a new device in Austin, TX.

If this was not you, please secure your account immediately by clicking the link below.


Secure My Account
